title: Rotary Cam Switch & Selector Switch Price in Pakistan 2026 — Motor Control, DOL & Star-Delta Complete Buyer Guide
summary_html: Rotary cam switch price in Pakistan 2026: Rs 350–3,500+. Complete buyer guide covering 3-position LOCAL/OFF/REMOTE selector switches for tubewell panels, star-delta cam switches, key-operated WAPDA isolators, AC-23A motor duty rating, ammeter/voltmeter selectors, and Pakistan-specific derating rules with 5-table PKR price reference.
